hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: The Naori by Alaya Stays in Udaipur offers air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and mountain views. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and free toiletries.
Dining Experience: Guests can enjoy Indian and international cuisines at the modern, family-friendly restaurant. The restaurant serves lunch, dinner, and high tea, with vegetarian options available.
Amenities and Services: The hotel features a garden, free WiFi, lift, 24-hour front desk, and free on-site private parking. Additional services include daily housekeeping, room service, and full-day security.
Local Attractions: Located 9 km from Udaipur Railway Station and 10 km from Lake Pichola, Jagdish Temple, and Bagore ki Haveli.

hotels.name: Mahendra Prakash

L'h脙麓tel Mahendra Prakash est situ脙漏 脙聽 Udaipur, 脙聽 350 m脙篓tres du temple Hanuman Ji. Il poss脙篓de un restaurant, une piscine ext脙漏rieure et des chambres dot脙漏es de la t脙漏l脙漏vision par c脙垄ble. Un parking gratuit est 脙漏galement 脙聽 votre disposition.

hotels.description_en:
Mahendra Prakash is located in Udaipur, 350 metres from Hanuman Ji Temple. It features a restaurant, outdoor swimming pool and rooms with a TV. Free parking is provided.

Overlooking the pool, traditional air-conditioned rooms at Mahendra are equipped with a seating area and private bathroom with shower facilities.

Guests can enjoy an Ayurvedic body massage, or enjoy views of the City Palace Fort from the rooftop terrace. Day trips and sightseeing arrangements can be made at the tour desk.

Offering views of the garden and swimming pool, the restaurant serves a variety of Indian and European dishes. Vegetarian dining options are also available.

Mahendra Prakash is 1.2 km from Sajjan Niwas Gardens and 2.2 km from Udaipur City Railway Station. Maharana Pratap Airport is 22.

hotels.description_it:
Ubicato a Udaipur, a 350 metri dal Tempio di Hanuman Ji, il Mahendra Prakash offre un ristorante, una piscina all'aperto, sistemazioni con TV e il parcheggio privato gratuito.

Tutte climatizzate, le camere del Mahendra presentano uno stile tradizionale, la vista sulla piscina, un'area salotto e un bagno privato con doccia.

Potrete rilassarvi con un massaggio ayurvedico, godere della vista sul Forte Cittadino dalla terrazza all'ultimo piano e organizzare gite giornaliere e visite turistiche con l'aiuto del personale del banco escursioni.

Con vista sul giardino e sulla piscina, il ristorante propone una variet脙聽 di piatti indiani ed europei, e non mancano opzioni vegetariane.

hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Oolala in Udaipur offers a 2-star homestay with family rooms and a sun terrace. Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and private bathrooms with walk-in showers.
Dining Experience: A child-friendly buffet serves continental, American, full English/Irish, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free breakfasts. Local specialities, warm dishes, cheese, and fruits are available.
Convenient Facilities: The property features a shared kitchen, minimarket, daily housekeeping, tour desk, and luggage storage. Additional amenities include a balcony, dining area, and outdoor seating.
Prime Location: Located 37 km from Maharana Pratap Airport, Oolala is near Jagdish Temple (6-minute walk), Bagore ki Haveli (400 metres), and City Palace of Udaipur (14-minute walk).
